summary: Project involves an app with vendors and category assignment; next planned enhancement is improving how vendors can be assigned to categories.

existing_features.title: Improve the vendor category selection UX in the VendorCategoryInput component so suggestions are easier to discover and keyboard navigation is more resilient.

new_feature_requests.summary: Enhance/improve how vendors can be assigned to categories.
Normalize and de-duplicate vendor categories on write in the backend (createVendor and updateVendorProfile) so stored vendor categories are consistent regardless of casing/extra whitespace.
Refine backend category filtering for listPublicVendorsByCategory so category matching is consistent with the frontend’s normalization rules and does not rely on substring matching.

projectName: Enhance vendor category assignment and discovery
